item.description:
# MacHelper Pro 1.0.0
## What's New
- Improves app startup performance by avoiding launch-time icon pixel scanning. - Keeps Check for Updates responsive by moving Finder permission probing out of the synchronous menu refresh path. - Improves Finder right-click menu configuration, icons, and permission state handling. - Improves Auto Wi-Fi Switch permission handling and startup behavior.
Requires macOS 13.0 or later.

# MacHelper Pro 1.0.0
## What's New
- Introduces MacHelper Pro as the direct-download flagship Mac utility app. - Includes display tools for mirrored MacBook display blackout, brightness, contrast, dim-until-key-press, and keyboard backlight control. - Adds optional Auto Wi-Fi Switch for saved Wi-Fi networks, with signal threshold controls and local-only Wi-Fi scanning. - Adds Finder right-click menu actions for copying paths and opening the current Finder selection in the configured editor, terminal, Codex, or VSCode. - Lets users configure the default terminal, default editor, enabled Finder menu items, and copy-path escaping. - Ships with a new MacHelper Pro icon and Sparkle update support.
## Install
1. Open the DMG. 2. Drag `MacHelper Pro.app` onto `Applications`. 3. Open MacHelper Pro from Applications.
The app appears in the macOS menu bar.
## Compatibility
Compatibility note: this direct-download app uses macOS capabilities that may not be suitable for a Mac App Store build and may change in future macOS updates.
Requires macOS 13.0 or later.
